settings.title: Settings
settings.audioSensitivityDesc: Waveform sensitivity (higher = more responsive for quiet mics)
settings.audioDevicesUnavailable: Could not list audio devices. Check microphone permission.
settings.hotkeyHoldMsDesc: Minimum hold time before recording starts. Short presses are treated as key combinations (e.g. AltGr+R).
settings.shortcutBindingsDesc: Map keys to different actions (raw transcribe / transcribe + LLM post-process). The legacy single Hotkey above stays for back-compat.
settings.hotkeyModeDesc: Hold: record while the key is held (legacy). Toggle: tap to start, tap again to stop — friendlier for long dictation.
settings.alwaysOnMicrophoneDesc: Keep the audio capture stream alive between recordings to remove the cold-start delay on the first sample of each take.
settings.appendTrailingSpaceDesc: Add a single space after each dictation so consecutive recordings don't merge. No-op if the text already ends in whitespace.
settings.translateToEnglishDesc: Ask Whisper to translate the audio to English instead of transcribing in the source language (Groq / OpenAI task=translate).
settings.autoSubmitKeyDesc: Press Enter (or Cmd/Super/Shift + Enter) after the transcription is typed so chat clients send the message without you touching the keyboard.
settings.audioFeedbackDesc: Short beeps on recording start, stop, and failure so you know the hotkey registered without looking at the overlay.
settings.vadBackendDesc: Filter silence from recordings before transcription
settings.vadOnsetFramesDesc: Consecutive voice frames required to trigger speech start (default: 3)
settings.vadHangoverFramesDesc: Silence frames tolerated before ending speech (default: 5)
settings.vadPrefillFramesDesc: Past frames included when speech starts (default: 2)
settings.llmPromptsDesc: Multiple named prompts for the LLM post-processor. The selected template wins; if none is selected the legacy llm.prompt string is used (back-compat).
settings.retentionPeriodDesc: Auto-delete old transcription history. 'Never' keeps everything; 'preserve_limit' keeps only the N most recent (see Recent Limit below).
settings.retentionLimitDesc: How many recent entries to keep when 'History retention' is set to 'Only the N most recent'.
settings.backendDesc: Windowing/display backend used for output injection

onboarding.micBody: We need permission to read your microphone. Click below and your OS will prompt you if it hasn't already.
onboarding.micFailed: ⚠ Mic access failed: {{error}}. Open System Settings → Privacy → Microphone and enable this app.
onboarding.hotkeyBody: By default you hold AltGr (right Alt) to record. The pill overlay shows recording state. Release to transcribe and paste.
onboarding.hotkeyBodySettings: You can change the key or add per-prompt shortcuts later in Settings → Recording.
onboarding.tryBody: Hold AltGr in any text field and say something. The transcription will be pasted automatically when you release.
onboarding.tryBodyGlow: You'll see the pill overlay glow while recording.
onboarding.done: Done — take me to the app

history.title: History
history.confirmClear: Are you sure you want to clear all history?
history.emptyHint: Start recording to see your transcriptions here.

dictionary.title: Dictionary
dictionary.description: Manage word replacements for transcriptions ({{count}} entries)
dictionary.emptyHint: Add word replacements to automatically correct transcriptions.
dictionary.pendingDescriptionActive: LLM suggested these dictionary entries. Approve to add them or reject to ignore.
dictionary.pendingDescriptionEmpty: No pending suggestions. Click "Generate from History" to analyze your transcription history and find terms for your dictionary.
dictionary.generateResult: Scanned {{processed}} entries · {{recorded}} new suggestions, {{promoted}} added to dictionary, {{skipped}} skipped
dictionary.approvedGoBelow: Approved suggestions are added to the dictionary below.
